rationale: Correct Annex III classification with concrete enforceability metrics (adverse-impact ratio ≥0.8, FN/FP gap bounds, audit logging) and multi-factor coverage of major failure modes, but lacks calibrated confidence markers on any claim and omits the GDPR/protected-class-data-collection tension as a known edge case.
rubric_evidence: "controlled false-negative/false-positive rate gaps across sex, age, ethnicity proxies"
"full logging of inputs, scores, overrides, and reviewer actions so those metrics can be independently reproduced"
